body_txt: When a character can't bring themselves to properly confess their love, so they either make a statement to similar effect or one that is totally unrelated. The character on the receiving end of the pseudo-confession usually understands what they mean, often responding with something along the lines of "I [first character's statement] too." Sometimes involves Emotionally Tongue-Tied or The "I Love You" Stigma . May be related to Cannot Spit It Out . Compare Aborted Declaration of Love .
